## Checklist

- [ ] Branched from and targeting the correct base (`develop` for most work)
- [ ] CI passes (lint, tests, build)
- [ ] Tests added or updated where relevant
- [ ] Docs updated where relevant
- [ ] No secrets or credentials committed
